description: Unit tests for the Carousel component in a Bootstrap-like JS library, testing initialization, navigation, event handling, and cleanup.

classes.name: Carousel
classes.description: A class representing the Carousel component, including methods for navigation, configuration, and cleanup.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes a new Carousel instance, accepting a DOM element or selector and configuration options.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the Carousel instance, removing event listeners and references.

methods.name: cycle
methods.description: Starts automatic cycling of slides, setting an interval based on data attributes or configuration.

methods.name: to
methods.description: Navigates directly to the specified slide index.

methods.name: next
methods.description: Navigates to the next slide if not sliding.

methods.name: prev
methods.description: Navigates to the previous slide if not sliding.

methods.name: nextWhenVisible
methods.description: Advances to next slide only if the page is visible.

methods.name: _slide
methods.description: Internal method to perform the slide transition, considering direction and RTL settings.

methods.name: _directionToOrder
methods.description: Converts a direction string ('left' or 'right') to a slide order ('next' or 'prev'), considering RTL mode.

methods.name: _orderToDirection
methods.description: Converts a slide order ('next' or 'prev') to a direction ('left' or 'right'), considering RTL mode.
